productDisplayName: Puma Men Team SS Black Tshirts
description: Composition Red and black jersey made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, horizontal panel stitching and branding on left chest Fit Comfort Wash care Machine was cold Wash separately Do not use softeners, bleach, iron or dry clean Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry German brand puma specialises in minimalism and simplicity. This jersey from puma with its angular silhouette and polyester fabric falls neatly from your shoulders. Simple and classy, pair this piece with fitted denims and casual shoes.
